name: run-test
description: Run tests with concise output (PASS/FAIL summary only) to reduce token cost. Supports go, vitest, jest, pytest, cargo, and npm.

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: Test tool: go, vitest, jest, pytest, cargo, or npm.

examples.expected: Summarized test output with PASS/FAIL lines.

cost_saving_rationale: Filters verbose test output to only PASS/FAIL lines and tail, dramatically reducing token cost vs full output.
